name: Venus's Groom
original_name: เจ้าบ่าวของดาวพระศุกร์
overview:
Blinded by rage and consumed by the need to avenge his brother, Pakin kidnaps a luxury hotel heir, holding him captive in the unforgiving wilderness. But fate plays a cruel trick: his hostage might not be the culprit he believes he is.

Beneath identical faces lies a stark difference one is a fire ready to burn, the other is water ready to heal. Can he tell them apart? And in the heart of the wild, how will forced proximity turn a sworn enemy into a lover?

trailers.title: [Official Trailer] Venus's Groom เจ้าบ่าวของดาวพระศุกร์
